title: Analyse machinery options
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Analyse machinery options demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Calculate costs associated with machinery use

pcs.text: Source and compare relevant benchmark data that relates machinery costs to workplace productivity and data
